question: Is the image a top-down realistic photograph of a dark wooden tabletop with clearly visible wood grain?
Is there a silver aluminum laptop at the exact center, opened at approximately 110 degrees, with a visible black keyboard and large trackpad?
Is there a closed dark gray matte laptop in the upper right corner, with its bottom edge parallel to and slightly overlapping the top edge of the central laptop?
Are there exactly 3 smartphones arranged in a vertical column directly to the left of the central laptop?
Is the topmost smartphone orange with its screen facing down?
Is the middle smartphone mint green with its screen facing up and illuminated?
Is the bottommost smartphone white with a ceramic back, placed diagonally with its top pointing toward the upper left?
Are there exactly 2 earphone charging cases placed side by side near the lower left of the frame?
Is the left earphone case white plastic and half-open revealing 2 earbuds, and the right case matte lemon yellow and closed tight?
Are there exactly 2 mugs in the upper left corner: a white ceramic mug with brown foam (left) and a transparent glass with blue foam and condensation (right)?
Are there exactly 2 hardcover notebooks standing vertically to the right of the central laptop?
Is the notebook closer to the laptop kraft paper with linen texture, and the one further right dark green cloth-bound with weave texture?
Are there exactly 3 pens lying horizontally on the kraft paper notebook, with all tips/nibs pointing to the right?
Is the bottom pen a black fountain pen with a gold clip, and are the two pens above it short ballpoint pens in red and silver respectively?
Are there exactly 2 mechanical pencils crossed below the notebooks?
Is there a blue mechanical pencil pointing toward the lower left, and a neon purple one crossing it (lower left to upper right) with tip pointing toward lower right?
Are there exactly 6 USB drives arranged in a fan shape between the laptops and the notebooks?
Is there a red metal USB drive (port up) and a silver swivel USB drive (port left)?
Is there a mint green fuzzy velvet USB drive (port down) and a black rubber waterproof USB drive (port right)?
Is there a transparent crystal-shell USB drive (port lower left) and a matte orange card-style USB drive (port upper right)?
Are there 2 sticky notes on the central laptop's trackpad: a bottom yellow layer and a top transparent frosted layer overlapping it?
Is there a red paper clip and a blue paper clip attached to the upper right corners of the sticky notes on the trackpad?
Are there exactly 2 blank light pink sticky notes placed side by side on the lower left corner of the closed dark gray laptop?
Is there a pink cactus in a terracotta pot with fine cracks located in the upper center-right area?
Are there exactly 2 pairs of glasses in the upper center-left area: one round tortoiseshell (folded) and one thin metal frame (green lenses)?
Is there a transparent plastic ruler with gold glitter inside placed horizontally at the bottom center?
Are there matte black scissors at the bottom left, half-open with blade tips pointing right?
Is there a small black camera at the bottom right with a lens cap attached, facing toward the upper left?
Is the image free from severe physical distortions or artifacts (e.g., malformed keyboards, floating objects)?
